# Invoice Template

> In practice, once [`PaymentSystem.md`](../PaymentSystem.md) is wired up, Stripe generates and emails invoices automatically. This template is for the interim (manual invoicing before Stripe Billing is fully in place) and to define exactly what fields a proper invoice needs.

---

**Aegis Health AI Ltd**
Company No. 16695420
Aegishealthai@outlook.com

**Invoice #:** [sequential, e.g. AEGIS-INV-0001]
**Date issued:**
**Due date:** [recommend 7–14 days]

**Bill to:** [Client / Business Name]

| Description | Amount |
|---|---|
| [e.g. "Deposit (50%) — Growth System Website, SOW #___"] | £ |
| **Total due** | **£** |

**Payment link:** [Stripe Payment Link]
**Reference this invoice # in payment notes if paying by bank transfer.**

---
Thank you for your business. Questions about this invoice: Aegishealthai@outlook.com
